Description: Raw process I/O for PowerShell — execute external commands and handle stdin/stdout/stderr as byte streams.

Locate installed Visual Studio instances via vswhere, generate a startup script that loads complete VS build environment for PowerShell 7.
Supports registering to Windows Registry and adding dedicated profile to Windows Terminal.
通过 vswhere 检索本机已安装的 Visual Studio，生成加载完整编译环境的 PowerShell 7 启动脚本，支持写入注册表注册程序、向 Windows Terminal 添加专属配置项。
PowerShell cmdlets for common administrative tasks, such as database management, service management and software installation.
The unofficial API cmdlet to interact with the Microsoft Defender XDR portal
Module that allows to manipulate, parse, format and optimize HTML, JavaScript and CSS
A PowerShell module to test the PSModule framework from a personal repo.
BSADellDriverPack is a PowerShell module to download Dell driver packs (CAB files) filtered by model, operating system and architecture.

A union type argument validation attribute written and for use in pwsh v7.5 .ps1 code. Supplies two different attribute classes for whether validating scalar or array item values. Currently only supporting one to eight types in the union set.

Know the instant someone blocks new connections on your RDSH servers. DrainCtl monitors drain mode in real time, tracks who changed it, counts active sessions, and alerts you before capacity runs out. Includes a multi-server dashboard with Kerberos SSO, webhook and ntfy.sh notifications with granular triggers, and a 90-day audit trail. Works standalone or as a Windows Service.
